mnemonics: SORTED LIST: Structure Of Resources To Ease Data Learning In Module Five
keyPoints: Focus on understanding the underlying algorithms, not just memorizing code.
Practice implementing data structures from scratch to reinforce your understanding.
Relate each data structure to its real-world application to build context.
commonMistakes: Confusing the implementation of similar data structures (e.g., Stack vs. Queue).
Focusing only on theoretical concepts without practical coding application.
